channel.title: Website_pages on javamurray.com
channel.description: Recent content in Website_pages on javamurray.com

item.title: About me
item.description:
Hello I am Java, I am a high school student who likes to make things. I have a love for design and prototyping, especially when it comes to turning ideas into real, working systems.

I enjoy programming and building projects in areas like robotics, electronics, and mechatronics. I also spend a lot of time working on 3D printing and mechanical design, including mechanisms and linkages, and I like exploring how physical systems move and interact.

item.title: Contact Information
item.description:
📬 Contact Me

Hi there! Feel free to reach out if you have questions, want to collaborate, or just want to say hello.

📧 Email

java@javamurray.com

🌐 Social Links

  • GitHub

item.title: Java Murray
item.description:
Contact: javamurray2@gmail.com

Experience

  • Sailing Coach: I coach sailing camps during the summer, working with youth aged 7–16. I teach and mentor sailors through the CANSail Levels 1–4 program, helping them develop sailing skills, confidence, and teamwork on the water.

Volunteer

  • First Robotics Team Role Mechatronics: I help in CAD, Software, Electronics. Designing and prototyping Our Teams robot. Facing real world engineering, logistical, and management challenges.

  • Sound Lead Technician: I was the sound lead for the Argyle Drama Theatre Production program, where I managed a team of four people. Where I learn how to manage and lead a team whille also being a team player.
